languages.text: "...таковы повседневные ритуалы, которые нужно соблюдать для сохранения функциональности организма". {n}Манипулус завершает речь, удивленно глядя на своего костяного спутника.{/n} "Нунциус, в мои аудиальные алгоритмы вкралась ошибка, или я слышу храп?"

"...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"
languages.original_text: "...таковы повседневные ритуалы, которые нужно соблюдать для сохранения функциональности организма". {n}Манипулус завершает речь, удивленно глядя на своего костяного спутника.{/n} "Нунциус, в мои аудиальные алгоритмы вкралась ошибка, или я слышу храп?"

traits.locale_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking surprised at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

"...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking surprised at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

"...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

"...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

languages.text: «... Esos son los rituales diarios que deben observarse para mantener el funcionamiento del organismo». {n}El manipulus termina su discurso y, sorprendido, mira a su cráneo acompañante.{/n} «Nuncius, ¿hay algún defecto en mis algoritmos auditivos, o estoy oyendo ronquidos?».
languages.original_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

traits.locale_text: «... Esos son los rituales diarios que deben observarse para mantener el funcionamiento del organismo». {n}El manipulus termina su discurso y, sorprendido, mira a su cráneo acompañante.{/n} «Nuncius, ¿hay algún defecto en mis algoritmos auditivos, o estoy oyendo ronquidos?».

languages.text: “……以上这些，就是为了维持有机体正常运作而必须坚持的日常仪式。”{n}操纵者结束了演讲，有些意外地看向自己的头骨同伴。{/n}“努恩修斯，是我的听觉算法出了差错，还是真的有人在打鼾？”
languages.original_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

traits.locale_text: “……以上这些，就是为了维持有机体正常运作而必须坚持的日常仪式。”{n}操纵者结束了演讲，有些意外地看向自己的头骨同伴。{/n}“努恩修斯，是我的听觉算法出了差错，还是真的有人在打鼾？”

languages.text: "... zum Beispiel die täglichen Rituale, die es zur Erhaltung der organischen Funktionen zu verrichten gilt." {n}Der Manipulus verstummt und betrachtet überrascht seinen Schädelgefährten.{/n} "Ein Fehler von Nuncius hat sich in meinen Akustiklogarithmus geschlichen, oder schnarcht da jemand?"
languages.original_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

traits.locale_text: "... zum Beispiel die täglichen Rituale, die es zur Erhaltung der organischen Funktionen zu verrichten gilt." {n}Der Manipulus verstummt und betrachtet überrascht seinen Schädelgefährten.{/n} "Ein Fehler von Nuncius hat sich in meinen Akustiklogarithmus geschlichen, oder schnarcht da jemand?"

languages.text: « ... tels sont les rituels quotidiens qu'il convient d'observer pour la préservation des fonctions de l'organisme. » {n}Le manipulus termine son discours et adresse un regard surpris à son compagnon servocrâne.{/n} « Nuncius, une erreur se serait-elle glissée dans mes algorithmes auditifs ou est-ce bel et bien des ronflements que j'entends ? »
languages.original_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

traits.locale_text: « ... tels sont les rituels quotidiens qu'il convient d'observer pour la préservation des fonctions de l'organisme. » {n}Le manipulus termine son discours et adresse un regard surpris à son compagnon servocrâne.{/n} « Nuncius, une erreur se serait-elle glissée dans mes algorithmes auditifs ou est-ce bel et bien des ronflements que j'entends ? »

languages.text: "Organizmanın işlevlerinin korunması için sürdürülmesi gereken günlük ayinler bunlardır." {n}Konuşmasını bitiren Manipülus, şaşkınlıkla kafatası yoldaşına bakıyor.{/n} "Nuncius, işitsel algoritmalarıma bir hata mı sızdı yoksa horlama mı duyuyorum?"
languages.original_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

traits.locale_text: "Organizmanın işlevlerinin korunması için sürdürülmesi gereken günlük ayinler bunlardır." {n}Konuşmasını bitiren Manipülus, şaşkınlıkla kafatası yoldaşına bakıyor.{/n} "Nuncius, işitsel algoritmalarıma bir hata mı sızdı yoksa horlama mı duyuyorum?"

languages.text: 「…そうした日課は、生物の機能を維持するために守らねばならないものだ。」{n}マニピュラスは、驚いた顔で頭蓋骨の仲間を見つめながら、彼の話を終える。{/n}「ヌンシウス、私の聴覚アルゴリズムに誤りが紛れ込んだのか、それとも、私は鼻息を聞いているのか？」
languages.original_text: "...such are the daily rituals which must be upheld for the preservation of the organism's functions." {n}The Manipulus finishes his speech, looking in surprise at his skull companion.{/n} "Nuncius, has an error crept into my auditory algorithms, or am I hearing snoring?"

traits.locale_text: 「…そうした日課は、生物の機能を維持するために守らねばならないものだ。」{n}マニピュラスは、驚いた顔で頭蓋骨の仲間を見つめながら、彼の話を終える。{/n}「ヌンシウス、私の聴覚アルゴリズムに誤りが紛れ込んだのか、それとも、私は鼻息を聞いているのか？」
